summary: Decorative handwriting/drawing stroke text animation component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-handwriting/src/TitleHandwriting.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleHandwriting` and `titleHandwritingDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleHandwriting` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Handwriting Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-handwriting to my project. Preserve the exported TitleHandwritingProps API and register the TitleHandwriting composition with the default props.
